titleStmt.title: SII 27.282: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 282. (A.R. No. 306 of 1935-36.) POṬṬIPĀḌU, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab kept in the chāvadi by the side of the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.

This damaged record refers to Dhavaḷeyarasa (of the Bāṇa family ?) as ruling some area and mentions Ponmanapāḍi. It seems to registers a gift to Punya-bhaṭṭa, Chandrayta-gāmuṇḍa and Pālavaṟṟa Komareya were witnesses.

It is dated Śaka 807, [Śōbhakṟit], Āshāḍha [ba] 13, Dakshiṇāyana[saṁkrānti]. The details are irregular. The cyclic year corresponded to Śaka 805 (883 A.D.) when the saṅkrānti occurred on Junee 24, Monday, the tithi being Āshāḍha-pūrṇimā. In Śaka 807 (885 A.D.) the saṅkrānti occurred on June 24, Thursday the tithi being Ashāḍha śu. 9. The former might be the intended date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śakanripakālātīta saṁvatsarameṇṭunūṟa Ēḻaneya varṣaṁ
pravattise śōbhakṛtsaṁvatsara dāṣāḍha māsada bahula trayōdasiyu dakṣiṇā
yanasaṁkrāntiyandu svasti sakaḷa jagatrayābhivandita surāsurādhīśa paramēśvara pratīhārī
kṛta bali kulōdbhava śrīmat dhavaḷeyarasararasugeyyuttu ponmana pāḍiya

lyagōtrada puṁnyabhaṭṭañge koṭṭōr bhōgapatige I ṟa
ḷa tuppamumaṁ koṭṭu sarvvapāda parihāramuṇbōr Idake sākṣi nūru
rura candrayta gāmuṇḍanuṁ pālavaṟra komareyanuṁ naḍeduguḍḍeyikki dōrini ba
Idaṁ salipōṁge Aśvamēdhada tolepuruṣada hiraṇyagarbhada phala

Aḻidō bāraṇāsiyuṁ brahmatiyuṁ sāsirakavileyuma Aḻidapāpa makku
yasya yasya yadābhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 27.282 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
